data.title: Treatment.com AI Launches AI-Powered Medical Education Suite
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Treatment.com International ( (TSE:TRUE) ) has provided an announcement.

Treatment.com AI Inc. has launched an updated version of its Medical Education Suite (MES), an AI-powered platform designed to enhance clinical skills training through AI-simulated patients. The University of Minnesota Medical School successfully implemented the MES with 240 students, achieving a 40% reduction in administrative costs. The platform aims to improve the objectivity and consistency of Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs) by integrating AI-simulated patients and real-time scoring. This deployment marks a significant advancement in medical education, offering scalable and cost-effective solutions for clinical skills assessment, and is expected to expand to other educational institutions globally.

Treatment.com International is struggling financially, with persistent losses and negative cash flow overshadowing recent revenue growth. The stock is technically weak, and valuation metrics highlight its unprofitable status. However, recent corporate events, including strategic acquisitions and partnerships, provide some potential for future growth, although they have not yet addressed the core financial challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:TRUE stock, click here.

More about Treatment.com International

Treatment.com AI Inc. is a company that leverages artificial intelligence and clinical best practices to address inefficiencies and challenges in the healthcare sector. It has developed the Global Library of Medicine (GLM), a comprehensive AI engine that provides personalized healthcare solutions with input from hundreds of healthcare professionals worldwide.

data.title: DarkPulse Partners with Kraken for Border Security
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from DarkPulse ( (DPLS) ) is now available.

On June 12, 2025, DarkPulse, Inc. announced a contract with Kraken International Security Solutions and its founder Boone Smith, a former Executive Director at U.S. Customs and Border Protection. This partnership aims to enhance DarkPulse’s border security solutions by leveraging Boone Smith’s extensive experience in national and border security. The collaboration is expected to bolster DarkPulse’s efforts to deploy its sensor systems along national borders, providing real-time surveillance and threat detection to improve America’s border security.

More about DarkPulse

DarkPulse, Inc. operates in the advanced laser-based monitoring systems industry, providing rapid and accurate monitoring of temperatures, strains, and stresses. The company’s technology is particularly effective for live, dynamic critical infrastructure and structural monitoring, including pipeline monitoring, perimeter and structural surveillance, aircraft structural components, and mining safety. DarkPulse’s fiber-based monitoring systems cover extended areas and can detect changes in strain or temperature, serving markets not currently addressed. The company also explores strategic alliances through joint ventures and licensing to expand its global market position.

Current Market Cap: $5.44M

Learn more about DPLS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bayhorse Silver Expands Mineralization at Oregon Mine, Plans Further Drilling
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Bayhorse Silver ( (TSE:BHS) ).

Bayhorse Silver Inc. has confirmed a 150-meter extension of silver mineralization at its Bayhorse Silver Mine in Oregon, indicating a total east-west strike length of nearly 500 meters. The company plans additional underground drilling to explore the new high-grade Drift Zone, which could enhance its operational capacity and market positioning, especially with silver prices reaching US$37 per ounce. The company is also progressing with baseline studies for its final Operating Permit application, which could further solidify its operational framework.

Spark’s Take on TSE:BHS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:BHS is a Underperform.

Bayhorse Silver’s stock score is heavily impacted by its poor financial performance, with persistent losses, high leverage, and negative cash flow. Despite some positive developments in drilling and mineralization, the technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, and the negative P/E ratio poses valuation concerns. The recent corporate events offer some optimism, but the overall financial instability and limited growth prospects dominate the score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:BHS stock, click here.

More about Bayhorse Silver

Bayhorse Silver Inc. is an exploration and production company with a 100% interest in the historic Bayhorse Silver Mine located in Oregon, USA, and the Pegasus Project in Washington County, Idaho. The company utilizes advanced Steinert Ore-Sorting technology to minimize waste and operates a facility capable of processing and supplying silver/copper concentrate. Bayhorse has an offtake agreement with Ocean Partners for its products.

data.title: Portobello S.p.A. Faces Uncertainty Ahead of Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Portobello SpA ( (IT:POR) ).

Portobello S.p.A. has published the documentation for its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for June 26, 2025. The auditing firm Audirevi and the Board of Statutory Auditors have both issued reports stating they cannot express an opinion on the company’s financial statements due to significant uncertainties related to its going concern assumption. This uncertainty is tied to the approval of a concordat plan, which has been certified by an independent professional.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:POR) stock is a Buy with a EUR13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Portobello SpA stock, see the IT:POR Stock Forecast page.

More about Portobello SpA

Portobello S.p.A., founded in Rome in 2016 and listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market, operates in the Media & Advertising, Retail, and B2B sectors. The company engages in the resale of advertising spaces, either for monetary compensation or through barter, and manages a chain of retail stores and co-owns the e-commerce portal ePRICE.

data.title: Tungray Technologies Inc Announces Change of Auditor
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Tungray Technologies Inc Class A ( (TRSG) ).

Tungray Technologies Inc, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with principal executive offices in Singapore, announced a change in its independent registered public accounting firm on June 9, 2025. The company dismissed Marcum Asia CPAs LLP and appointed Guangdong Prouden CPAs GP as its new auditor. This decision was made after a careful evaluation process and was approved by the company’s audit committee. The change was not due to any disagreements over accounting principles or practices, financial statement disclosures, or auditing scope or procedures. The audit reports from Marcum Asia for the fiscal years 2023 and 2024 were unqualified, and there were no reportable disagreements during this period. However, the company had identified material weaknesses in its internal controls, including a lack of formal risk assessment processes and insufficient accounting staff knowledgeable in U.S. GAAP and SEC requirements.

Spark’s Take on TRSG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TRSG is a Neutral.

Tungray Technologies Inc Class A is financially stable with strong revenue growth and a healthy profit margin, although cash flow management requires improvement. Technical analysis suggests a neutral to slightly bearish outlook. Valuation analysis is limited due to missing data, and the earnings call did not provide additional insights. Overall, the stock presents moderate investment appeal with opportunities for improvement in operational and cash flow efficiency.

To see Spark’s full report on TRSG stock, click here.

More about Tungray Technologies Inc Class A

Recharge Resources Ltd ( (TSE:UUU) ) has provided an update.

Vanguard Mining Corp. is advancing its uranium exploration efforts with the initiation of a site visit and core review for the NI 43-101 Technical Report on its newly acquired Yuty Prometeo Project in southeastern Paraguay. This project, located in the uranium-rich Paraná Basin and adjacent to UEC’s Yuty Project, represents a strategic expansion of Vanguard’s portfolio. The site visit, led by senior geologist Ariel Testi, aims to validate the geological potential of the asset, which could enhance Vanguard’s position in the uranium exploration industry.
